summary: Iteration 2 backend testing complete. All 43 backend tests pass (16 new iteration 2 + 27 iteration 1 regression). Email verification, geolocation healing map, and WebSocket streaming chat all work end-to-end. Updated iteration 1 fixture to follow new register->verify->login flow.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1099 lines - exceeds 700-line guideline; recommend splitting into modules (auth, websocket, chat, healing, profile).
WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws/chat/{booking_id} is registered on app (not api router) which works because the path includes /api prefix - acceptable but inconsistent with rest of routes.
_doctor_system_prompt is duplicated in /api/chat/send and /api/ws/chat - already extracted as helper, good.
verify-email error messages are in Indonesian only; consider i18n support for future.
WebSocket streaming sends one JSON event per word with 30ms sleep - for very long Claude responses this could mean 2-5 seconds extra latency; acceptable as 'streaming UX'.
test_credentials: Admin admin@echoaid.com / Admin@EchoAid2026 verified working. Test users created dynamically with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral users via register API; admin seeded at startup with email_verified=true confirmed via backfill update_one.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 added: (a) register no longer auto-logs in - returns ok=true + dev_verification_url in testing mode since SENDER_EMAIL=onboarding@resend.dev; (b) /api/auth/verify-email + /api/auth/resend-verification work; (c) login returns 403 detail={code:'email_not_verified',...} for unverified; (d) /api/healing/parks?lat&lng sorts by haversine distance and adds distance_km field, Taman Suropati at exact coords returns 0.0km; (e) WebSocket /api/ws/chat/{booking_id} accepts ?token=<jwt> query param auth, emits ready->user_message->typing->ai_chunk(s)->ai_message events. Claude AI response takes ~5-15s. Iteration 1 backend_test.py fixture updated to handle new verify-then-login flow; existing 27 tests still pass.
